raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white faucet is mounted on a sink. The faucet has a left handle and a right handle. The task is to turn the left tap. STRATEGY - Reach the left tap handle, grasp it, and rotate it to the desired position. Failure modes include not grasping the handle properly or rotating it too far. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the left tap handle; Step 2 grasp the left tap handle; Step 3 rotate the left tap handle.**
Goal: rotated(left_tap, target_angle)
Scene: sink, left_tap, right_tap
Step 1: reach(left_tap)
  affordance_region: the left handle of the faucet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, left_tap, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, left_tap) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(left_tap)
  affordance_region: the left handle of the faucet
  contact: holding(left_tap) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(left_tap)
Step 3: rotate(left_tap, target_angle)
  affordance_region: the left handle of the faucet
  contact: holding(left_tap) [progress]
  direction: rotate_axis(0, 0, 1) [progress]
  safety: no_slip(left_tap)
  done_when: angle(left_tap, target_angle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the left handle of the faucet
the left handle of the faucet
the left handle of the faucet
